title: eragrostis aurea
intro: Eragrostis aurea, also known as golden love grass, is a species of grass native to the eastern and central United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Eragrostis aurea include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Eragrostis aurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
